scripts.dev:web: npm run build --workspace=@sketchstrike/shared && npm run dev --workspace=@sketchstrike/web
scripts.dev:server: npm run build --workspace=@sketchstrike/shared && npm run dev --workspace=@sketchstrike/server
scripts.start:server: npm run build --workspace=@sketchstrike/shared && npm run build --workspace=@sketchstrike/server && npm run start --workspace=@sketchstrike/server
